page.content: In January 2024, JD.com reported a Returns Rate of 5.2%, with a Return Processing Cost of SGD3.5M, and Net Sales amounting to SGD67.5M.

page.content: The Logistics Metrics indicate a Customer Satisfaction Index of 85%, with an Average Return Time of 3.2 days and a Cost of Returns totaling SGD1.5M. The Inventory Turnover stands at 6.1, while the Gross Margin is 24%, and the Operating Margin is 12%. The Debt to Equity ratio is 0.45, with a Current Ratio of 1.8 and a Price to Earnings Ratio of 18.5.

page.content: The Net Profit Margin is 8%, leading to a Total of SGD150M. In the Private Label Market Share, the Food & Beverages category holds a Market Share of 25% with a Growth Rate of 5% and a Sales Amount of SGD200M, while Household Products have a Market Share of 30% and a Growth Rate of 7%. Personal Care has a Market Share of 20% and a Growth Rate of 4% with Sales Amounting to SGD100M. Clothing & Apparel accounts for a 15% Market Share with Sales of SGD75M, and Electronics represent a 10% Market Share with SGD50M in Sales. Other Goods contribute a 5% Market Share, generating SGD25M in Sales. The total Market Share is 100%, with a Sales Amount of SGD600M. Market Growth is at 15%, with values for Growth Rate and Sales Amount as N/A.
